query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sales_quotas (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  period VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL,
  periodType ENUM('monthly','quarterly','annual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly',
  targetAmount BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  sqCurrency VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT 'USD',
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_sq_user_period (userId, period)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sms_messages (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  contactId INT,
  smsDirection ENUM('outbound','inbound') NOT NULL,
  fromNumber VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  toNumber VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  body TEXT NOT NULL,
  smsStatus ENUM('queued','sent','delivered','failed','received') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'queued',
  twilioSid VARCHAR(64),
  smsErrorCode VARCHAR(32),
  sentAt BIGINT,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_sms_contact (contactId),
  INDEX idx_sms_tenant (tenantId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gdpr_consents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  contactId INT NOT NULL,
  consentType VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  granted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  gdprSource VARCHAR(128),
  ipAddress VARCHAR(64),
  grantedAt BIGINT,
  revokedAt BIGINT,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updatedAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_gdpr_contact (contactId, consentType)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gdpr_deletion_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  contactId INT NOT NULL,
  requestedBy INT,
  reason TEXT,
  deletionStatus ENUM('pending','processing','completed','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  completedAt BIGINT,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_gdpr_del_tenant (tenantId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portal_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  portalAccessId INT NOT NULL,
  contactId INT,
  dealId INT,
  fileName VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  fileUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  fileKey VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  mimeType VARCHAR(128),
  fileSize INT,
  pdUploadedBy ENUM('customer','rep') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'customer',
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_pd_portal (portalAccessId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portal_comments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  tenantId INT NOT NULL,
  portalAccessId INT NOT NULL,
  dealId INT,
  body TEXT NOT NULL,
  pcAuthorType ENUM('customer','rep') NOT NULL,
  authorName VARCHAR(256),
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_pc_portal (portalAccessId)
);
